 Huge crowds have gathered around Trafalgar Square and The Mall in central London to mark the Queen's 70 years on the throne. 
 The Jubilee celebrations are being spread over four days of events, and began with Trooping the Colour earlier on Thursday.

[TITLE]: Aerial shots show scale of Trump protest in Trafalgar Square – video | Donald Trump | The Guardian
[METADATA/INTRO]: Aerial shots show scale of Trump protest in Trafalgar Square – video This article is more than 7 years old...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Aerial shots show scale of Trump protest in Trafalgar Square – video 
 This article is more than 7 years old 
 Tens of thousands gathered to protest against Donald Trump's visit to the UK. The US president arrived on Thursday and attended a gala at Blenheim Palace, Oxfordshire. On Friday, he held a press conference with Theresa May and had tea at Windsor with the Queen
